description: Stoichiometry and the mole concept, the behavior of gases, liquids and solids, thermochemistry, electronic structure of atoms and chemical bonding, descriptive chemistry of selected elements and compounds, intermolecular forces, and chemistry laboratory skills.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: MATH 112,114,171,221, or placement intoMATH 211or221. Not open to students with credit forCHEM 109or115
